'''zharofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemblanity|zemblanity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemblanity|zemblanity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zharofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhærefeth|zhærefeth]] || [[word:zhærefej|zhærefej]] || [[word:zhærefesh|zhærefesh]] || [[word:zhærefe|zhærefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zharorofoth|zharorofoth]] || [[word:zharorofoj|zharorofoj]] || [[word:zharorofosh|zharorofosh]] || [[word:zharorofo|zharorofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zharofoth|zharofoth]] || [[word:zharofoj|zharofoj]] || [[word:zharofosh|zharofosh]] || [[word:zharofo|zharofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zharoffoth|zharoffoth]] || [[word:zharoffoj|zharoffoj]] || [[word:zharoffosh|zharoffosh]] || [[word:zharoffof|zharoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zharofotho|zharofotho]] || [[word:zharofojo|zharofojo]] || [[word:zharofosho|zharofosho]] || [[word:zharofoko|zharofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zharofoth|zharofoth]] || [[word:zharofoj|zharofoj]] || [[word:zharofosh|zharofosh]] || [[word:zharofo|zharofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zharofothol|zharofothol]] || [[word:zharofojol|zharofojol]] || [[word:zharofoshol|zharofoshol]] || [[word:zharofokol|zharofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zharofothotho|zharofothotho]] || [[word:zharofojojo|zharofojojo]] || [[word:zharofoshosho|zharofoshosho]] || [[word:zharofoko|zharofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zharofothon|zharofothon]] || [[word:zharofojon|zharofojon]] || [[word:zharofoshon|zharofoshon]] || [[word:zharofokon|zharofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zharofothoro|zharofothoro]] || [[word:zharofojoro|zharofojoro]] || [[word:zharofoshoro|zharofoshoro]] || [[word:zharofokoro|zharofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
